creator: pfgiffun@bachue.usc.unal.edu.co
text:
I grabbed a list of fixes applied in the Linux's distribution of XView
and applied the related changes in the FreeBSD port. The changes I 
selected were big but I was rather conservative.

How-To-Repeat: Please apply this uuencoded gzipped-patch, the changes to x11-config
that come in another PR should also be applied.
